subcodes.title: Words to some Christian ministers, spoken on 1912-12-01
subcodes.first_line: The teachings of Christ are forgotten. Consider that Christ commanded Peter to sheathe his sword. He also said
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالیم حضرت مسیح فراموش شده ملاحظه نمائید که مسیح بپطرس میفرماید شمشیر خود را غلاف کن باز می‌فرماید
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
